title: Magic Cobblestone Generator
description: Upgrade cobblestone generators to produce ores, custom blocks, and rare materials. Fully configurable per island level.
body:
# 💎 Magic Cobblestone Generator — Better Blocks, Better Islands

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/272499714048524288.svg?logo=discord)](https://discord.bentobox.world)
[![Build Status](https://ci.codemc.org/buildStatus/icon?job=BentoBoxWorld/MagicCobblestoneGenerator)](https://ci.codemc.org/job/BentoBoxWorld/job/MagicCobblestoneGenerator/)

Turn boring cobblestone generators into a source of valuable ores and materials. As players level up their island, the generator produces increasingly rare blocks.

## Features

- **Tiered generation** — blocks produced change based on island level
- **Fully configurable** — set exactly which blocks appear at each tier and their probability
- **Multiple generator types** — cobblestone, stone, and basalt generators all supported
- **Per-island permissions** — control which tiers each island has access to
- **Works with all BentoBox game modes**

Pairs perfectly with the **Level** addon — as island level increases, generator output improves, creating a natural progression loop.

📦 Requires [BentoBox](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bentobox) + a game mode addon.
More information can be found in [BentoBox Docs Pages](https://docs.bentobox.world/en/latest/addons/MagicCobblestoneGenerator/).
